assumption_weighted_effective_small_bids.tex_statement: {Advertiser : Type u_1} \to {Query : Type u_2} \to PaperInstance Advertiser Query \to (Advertiser \to ℝ) \to ℝ \to Prop

paperBalanceScore_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperBalanceScore_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Query] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query) (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), paperBalanceScore I A a q = bid a q * paperTradeoff (paperSpend I A a / budget a)

paperCanAssign_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperCanAssign_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Query] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query) (q : Query) (a : Advertiser), paperCanAssign I A q a \iff paperSpend I A a + bid a q \le budget a

paperFeasible_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperFeasible_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Query] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query), paperFeasible I A \iff \forall (a : Advertiser), paperSpend I A a \le budget a

paperFractionalFeasible_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperFractionalFeasible_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Fintype Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (x : Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ), PaperFractionalFeasible I x \iff (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), 0 \le x a q) \land (\forall (q : Query), \sum a, x a q \le 1) \land \forall (a : Advertiser), \sum q, bid a q * x a q \le budget a

paperFractionalRevenue_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperFractionalRevenue_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Fintype Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (x : Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ), paperFractionalRevenue I x = \sum q, \sum a, bid a q * x a q

paperIsBalanceChoice_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperIsBalanceChoice_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Fintype Query] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query) (q : Query) (a : Advertiser), paperIsBalanceChoice I A q a \iff paperCanAssign I A q a \land \forall (b : Advertiser), paperCanAssign I A q b \to paperBalanceScore I A b q \le paperBalanceScore I A a q

paperMsvvRatio_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.

paperRevenue_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperRevenue_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query), paperRevenue I A = \sum q, match A q with | none  =>  0 | some a  =>  bid a q

paperSlotsPerPageDistinct_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperSlotsPerPageDistinct_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} (Slot : Query \to Type u_3) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser ((q : Query) × Slot q)), paperSlotsPerPageDistinct Slot A \iff \forall (q : Query) (s₁ s₂ : Slot q) (a : Advertiser), A ⟨q, s₁⟩ = some a \to A ⟨q, s₂⟩ = some a \to s₁ = s₂

paperSmallBidsLimitFamily_fields.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperSmallBidsLimitFamily_fields.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (F : PaperSmallBidsLimitFamily Advertiser), (\forall (k : ℕ), NonnegativeBids (instanceAt k)) \land (\forall (k : ℕ), PositiveBudgets (instanceAt k)) \land (\forall (k : ℕ), 0 < \sum q, maxBidForQuery (instanceAt k) q) \land (\forall (delta : ℝ), 0 < delta \to \exists N, \forall (k : ℕ), N \le k \to paperSmallBids (instanceAt k) (min 1 (delta / ((exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, maxBidForQuery (instanceAt k) q)))) \land SeqTendsTo (fun k  =>  offlineOptimumValue (instanceAt k) ⋯) optLimit \land SeqTendsTo (fun k  =>  revenue (instanceAt k) (runAssignment (instanceAt k) (balanceChoiceRule (instanceAt k)) (finRange (queryCount k)))) revenueLimit

paperSmallBids_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperSmallBids_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (epsilon : ℝ), paperSmallBids I epsilon \iff \forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), bid a q \le epsilon * budget a

paperSpend_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
paperSpend_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Query] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (A : PaperAssignment Advertiser Query) (a : Advertiser), paperSpend I A a = \sum q, match A q with | none  =>  0 | some a'  =>  if a' = a then bid a q else 0

paperTradeoff_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.

section6_availability_theorem8_finite_ex.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_availability_theorem8_finite_ex.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (available : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) [inst_5 : (a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (available a q)], NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withAvailability I available).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withAvailability I available).revenue ((withAvailability I available).runAssignment (withAvailability I available).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withAvailability I available).maxBidForQuery q

section6_click_through_rates_theorem8_fi.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_click_through_rates_theorem8_fi.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (ctr : Advertiser \to Query \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), 0 \le ctr a q) \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), ctr a q \le 1) \to NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * (withClickThroughRates I ctr).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withClickThroughRates I ctr).revenue ((withClickThroughRates I ctr).runAssignment (withClickThroughRates I ctr).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withClickThroughRates I ctr).maxBidForQuery q

section6_different_budgets_and_nonexhaus.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_different_budgets_and_nonexhaus.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * offlineOptimumValue I ⋯ \le paperRevenue I (runAssignment I (balanceChoiceRule I) history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, maxBidForQuery I q

section6_next_highest_bid_alive_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_next_highest_bid_alive_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (alive : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) [inst_2 : (a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (alive a q)] (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive a q = have others := {b \in erase a | alive b q}; if h : Nonempty then max 0 (sup' h fun b  =>  bid b q) else 0

section6_next_highest_bid_alive_theorem8.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_next_highest_bid_alive_theorem8.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (alive : Advertiser \to Query \to Prop) [inst_5 : (a : Advertiser) \to (q : Query) \to Decidable (alive a q)] (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le paperRevenue (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)) ((withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).runAssignment (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_alive I alive)).maxBidForQuery q

section6_next_highest_bid_all_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_next_highest_bid_all_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_all I a q = have others := erase a; if h : Nonempty then max 0 (sup' h fun b  =>  bid b q) else 0

section6_next_highest_bid_all_theorem8_f.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_next_highest_bid_all_theorem8_f.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), section6_next_highest_bid_all I a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le paperRevenue (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)) ((withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).runAssignment (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withEffectiveBids I (section6_next_highest_bid_all I)).maxBidForQuery q

section6_page_top_balance_theorem8_finit.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section6_page_top_balance_theorem8_finit.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (slots : Query \to ℕ), NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to paperSmallBids I epsilon \to paperMsvvRatio * pageOfflineOptimumValue I slots ⋯ \le pageRevenue I (runPageAssignment I slots (pageTopBalanceRule I slots) history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * pageHistoryMaxBidSum I slots history

section8_weighted_bids_theorem8_finite_e.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
section8_weighted_bids_theorem8_finite_e.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} {Query : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : Fintype Query] [inst_3 : DecidableEq Advertiser] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Query] (I : PaperInstance Advertiser Query) (weight : Advertiser \to ℝ), (\forall (a : Advertiser), 0 \le weight a) \to NonnegativeBids I \to \forall (hbudget : PositiveBudgets I) (history : List Query), Nodup \to historyFinset history = univ \to \forall {epsilon : ℝ}, 0 \le epsilon \to epsilon \le 1 \to (\forall (a : Advertiser) (q : Query), weight a * bid a q \le epsilon * budget a) \to paperMsvvRatio * (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).offlineOptimumValue ⋯ \le (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).revenue ((withAdvertiserWeights I weight).runAssignment (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).balanceChoiceRule history) + epsilon * (exp 1 + 1) * \sum q, (withAdvertiserWeights I weight).maxBidForQuery q

theorem8_balance_msvv_competitive_of_sma.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem8_balance_msvv_competitive_of_sma.tex_statement: \forall {Advertiser : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Advertiser] [inst_1 : Nonempty Advertiser] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Advertiser] (F : PaperSmallBidsLimitFamily Advertiser), paperMsvvRatio * optLimit \le revenueLimit

theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue_formula.tex_statement: \forall (N : ℕ) (algorithm : theorem9IntegralPrefixAlgorithm N) (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue N algorithm permutation = (\sum bidder, min 1 (\sum round, prefixAllocation algorithm (theorem9ObservedPrefix N permutation round) round (permutation bidder))) / ↑N

theorem9HardDistribution_uniform.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.

theorem9_no_randomized_online_algorithm_.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem9_no_randomized_online_algorithm_.tex_statement: \forall (delta : ℝ), 0 < delta \to \exists N0, \forall (N : ℕ), N0 \le N \to \forall (randomizedAlgorithm : theorem9RandomizedOnlineAlgorithm N), \lnot\forall (permutation : Perm (Fin N)), paperMsvvRatio + delta < pmfExp randomizedAlgorithm fun algorithm  =>  theorem9CappedNormalizedRevenue N algorithm permutation

prompt_summary: Translate each Lean declaration from the Lean statement alone, with no paper context.
Preserve every visible variable, binder, hypothesis, domain condition, equivalence or implication direction, and conclusion.
Do not replace formulas with theorem labels, informal endpoints, or proof-route summaries.
